_comment: Pinned official Node runtime for the Go bootstrapper. node-pty is a native dependency, so nodeAbi (NODE_MODULE_VERSION) MUST match the payload's prebuilds. Update url+sha256+abi together when bumping. sha256 is the official nodejs.org SHASUMS256.txt entry for the win-x64 zip; abi is `node -p process.versions.modules` for that version. Values are embedded as STRINGS in the signed manifest.
